subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-07-29 in Dublin
subcodes.first_line: Stagnation is the cause of retrogression. Man must always advance. As soon as man remains stationary in a certain cause he will go backward.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion
